title: lithocarpus ternaticupulus var. subreticulata
intro: Lithocarpus ternaticupulus var. subreticulata is a variant of the Lithocarpus ternaticupulus species, a type of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. This tree is also known as the 'Ternate copper beech' and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus ternaticupulus var. subreticulata include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as promoting wound healing and immune system function. Traditional herbal preparations involve using the leaves and bark to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
